description_long: This is a yellow umbrella with a classic domed canopy, featuring black Chinese text and a small umbrella icon printed on several panels. The canopy is divided into multiple segments, each separated by visible seams, giving it a structured and symmetrical appearance. The handle is a dark brown, smooth, and curved hook, typical of traditional umbrellas, and appears to be made of wood or plastic. The tip of the umbrella is capped and rounded, matching the color of the handle. The overall construction suggests a lightweight frame, likely metal or fiberglass, supporting the fabric canopy. The umbrella's design is both functional and visually distinctive, suitable for personal use in urban environments.
description: A yellow umbrella with a domed, segmented canopy, black Chinese text, and a curved brown hook handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow canopy with black Chinese text and icon on the left panel, and the curved brown handle visible below.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted yellow canopy with text and icon on the right panel, and the tip of the handle pointing directly downward.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the yellow canopy with black text and icon on the right, and the curved handle extending to the left.
description_view_3: Direct front view with the black Chinese text and umbrella icon centered on the yellow canopy, and the handle directly below.
attribute_canopy_pattern: solid yellow with black text and icon
